era: 1989-1992. Grunge/Punk. E=7 -- driving, raw, Sub Pop grunge wave. Seattle. Sub Pop.

theory_nodes.concept: Sub Pop grunge/punk wave 1989-1992: the artisan era before Nevermind. Swallow among the cohort that constituted the wave. Pavitt + Poneman + Jack Endino + Reciprocal Recording. Singles Club. UK press first.
theory_nodes.description: Sub Pop's wave era: the formation moment documented.

theory_nodes.concept: Grunge origin arc opens at 293: four degrees (293-296) trace the complete origin story from the Sub Pop wave (293) through Green River (294), Malfunkshun (295), Mother Love Bone (296). The arc explains Pearl Jam and Mudhoney.
theory_nodes.description: 293-296 origin arc: the four-degree origin story.

theory_nodes.concept: E=7 reset after E=8 streak (290-292). Grunge/punk native energy: heavy, physical, driving but not maximal. The Sub Pop baseline calibration.
theory_nodes.description: E=7 returns at 293 after three-degree E=8 punk streak.

cross_references.relationship: E=8 streak closes. Punk/Garage. Fremont/AmRep. The E=8 arc ends; E=7 resets at 293.
The origin band. First Sub Pop release. Deep Six 1986. Green River is the origin Swallow's wave was built from.
The pivot point. The arc Swallow opens concludes at the convergence of Green River and Malfunkshun personnel.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=6 (Caspian Tern) + E=7 (Swallow) = E=13. Loud raspy ka-arr pairs with driving Sub Pop grunge/punk. Both direct, undecorated, projecting.
